scripts.dev:all: npm run db:migrate && concurrently -n worker,web -c blue,green "npm run worker:dev" "npm run dev"
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply rentme-db --local --config workers/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply rentme-db --remote --config workers/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.pages:deploy: VITE_API_URL=https://rentme-api.engineeriqbbal.workers.dev npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=rentme --branch main
